name: chainlesschain-design-docs
description: ChainlessChain 系统设计文档网站 - 面向开发者的架构与模块设计文档

scripts.dev: npm run sync && vitepress dev docs

scripts.build:offline: npm run sync && vitepress build docs && node scripts/postprocess-dist.js
